case_title: KARIM KHALDI VS. JAMES PROUD et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT PROUD, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAMES PROUD--CEO. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,525.68 FILED BY KHALDI, KARIM AS TO DEFENDANT PROUD, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALDI, KARIM
ORDER REQUIRING DEFENDANT PROUD TO REQUEST DISMISSAL AT SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $65.00 SERVED NOV-07-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PROUD, JAMES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HELLO, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALDI, KARIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HELLO, INC PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JAMES PROUD (DEFENDANT) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $65.00 SERVED NOV-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HELLO, INC
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JAMES PROUD BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 AT 3:30 PM.
